## Runtime.Session.IReadOnlyEditingSessionValidator interface

Read-only interface for EditingSessionValidator. Provides validated access to session ingredients using weakly-typed inputs.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IReadOnlyEditingSessionValidator 
```
